stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Construction begins with proper site selection and foundation planning.
stages.explanation: Construction begins with proper site selection and foundation planning.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Survey grid lines and wall centerlines are established on site.
stages.explanation: Accurate setting out ensures dimensional control and structural alignment.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Excavation. Foundation trenches are cut to expose competent bearing strata.
stages.explanation: Excavation removes weak soil and reaches competent bearing strata.

stages.title: PCC Layer
stages.narration: Stage 4. Plain cement concrete is placed to form a level, clean working base.
stages.explanation: PCC provides a stable base and prevents contamination of structural concrete.

stages.title: RCC Footings
stages.narration: Stage 5. Reinforced concrete footings are cast with assembled rebar cages and compacted concrete.
stages.explanation: Footings distribute structural loads safely into the ground.

stages.title: Foundation Masonry
stages.narration: Stage 6. Foundation masonry courses are laid in cement mortar above the footings.
stages.explanation: Foundation masonry transfers wall loads into the footing system.

stages.title: Plinth Band
stages.narration: Stage 7. The reinforced concrete plinth band is cast continuously around the structure.
stages.explanation: Plinth bands improve structural continuity and reduce differential settlement.

stages.title: Fly Ash Brick Wall Construction
stages.narration: Stage 8. Fly ash brick masonry walls are now being constructed. The uniform geometry of fly ash bricks improves alignment, reduces construction errors and enhances structural performance.
stages.explanation: Fly ash bricks provide uniform geometry, high strength and improved durability.

stages.title: Window and Door Openings
stages.narration: Stage 9. Door and window frames are installed with reinforcement detailing around openings.
stages.explanation: Openings require careful detailing to avoid stress concentration.

stages.title: Lintel Band
stages.narration: Stage 10. A continuous reinforced concrete lintel band is cast at opening head level.
stages.explanation: Lintel bands tie walls together and improve earthquake resistance.

stages.title: Roof Band
stages.narration: Stage 11. The roof-level reinforced concrete band is cast to complete the ring beam.
stages.explanation: Roof bands create box action behavior during seismic loading.

stages.title: RCC Roof Slab
stages.narration: Stage 12. The RCC roof slab is formed with reinforcement, poured concrete, vibration, and curing.
stages.explanation: The roof slab distributes loads and stabilizes the entire structure.

stages.title: Damp Proof Course
stages.narration: Stage 13. The damp proof course and waterproofing membrane are applied to prevent moisture rise.
stages.explanation: The damp proof course prevents moisture from rising into walls.

stages.title: Plastering
stages.narration: Stage 14. Internal and external plaster finishes are applied for durability and weather resistance.
stages.explanation: Plaster improves durability and weather resistance.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. Fly ash masonry provides sustainable, thermally efficient, and seismically improved residential construction.
stages.explanation: Fully completed fly ash masonry house with continuous bands and RCC roof.

foundation.title: RCC Footing
foundation.loadTransfer: Spreads wall reactions to bearing soil.
foundation.soilPressure: Uniform bearing pressure below pad footings.

fly_ash_brick.title: Fly Ash Brick
fly_ash_brick.materialProperties: Class F fly ash binder with uniform kiln-cured units.
fly_ash_brick.thermalPerformance: Lower thermal conductivity than solid clay brick.

plinth_band.title: Plinth Band
plinth_band.structuralContinuity: Ties walls at plinth level for load redistribution.
plinth_band.settlementControl: Reduces differential movement between wall panels.

lintel_band.title: Lintel Band
lintel_band.earthquakeResistance: Continuous RC band improves in-plane wall action.

roof_band.title: Roof Band
roof_band.boxActionBehavior: Ring beam with slab creates diaphragm box action.

roof_slab.title: RCC Roof Slab
roof_slab.loadDistribution: Distributes gravity and lateral loads to bearing walls.
roof_slab.reinforcementLayout: Main and distribution reinforcement per span.

damp_proof_course.title: Damp Proof Course
damp_proof_course.moistureProtection: Impermeable layer blocks capillary moisture rise.
